after line ~428 — binder construction in processEvent
content:
// Build binder if terminal — using canonical Binder type from binder.ts
      const binder: Binder | null = isTerminal(newState)
        ? {
            schemaVersion: "v1",
            binderVersion: 1,
            laneId,
            campaignId: lane.campaignId,
            status: newState,
            missionObjective: "",
            laneScope: lane.scope,
            claimedFiles: [],
            dependencyLaneIds: [...lane.dependencies],
            scoutReports: [],
            criticReviews: [],
            executionEvents: updatedStream.map((e) => ({
              eventId: `${laneId}:${e._tag}:${now()}`,
              eventType: e._tag,
              ts: new Date().toISOString(),
              summary: `Event: ${e._tag}`,
            })),
            validationResults: [],
            redTeamFindings: [],
            repairHistory: [],
            residualRisks: [],
            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            completedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            artifactDigest: "",
          }
        : null
